titleZh: 中国公司法修订对人力资源管理的影响
titleEn: Chinese Company Law Amendment: Impact on HR Management
abstractZh: 聚焦职工董事、竞业限制、忠实义务和劳动管理交叉问题，适合与公司治理和董监高义务专题联读。
abstractEn: Focuses on employee representation, non-compete issues, and loyalty-duty implications where the revised Company Law intersects with HR management.
